default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Q1 content strategy and landing page optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Q1 Content Focus:** Prioritize Sanity content to capitalize on its status as the top lead-generating partner. The strategy shifts from high-volume, saturated topics (e.g., inbound marketing) to high-quality, targeted content on emerging areas like Sanity AI features.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Landing Page Redesign:** Redesign CMS capability pages to be focused conversion hubs. This involves replacing the dynamic "Additional Resources" section with a static set of 3–5 high-value articles and a new, scrollable list for other related posts.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Partner Content Priority:** The content roadmap will focus on three key partners: 1) Sanity, 2) Storyblok (to revive the partnership), and 3) Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [**Task Management:** A new task tracking system will be implemented. Webstacks will receive notifications via Slack, as it is the most effective channel for capturing their attention.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content Strategy: Partner Focus

  - [**Rationale:** Q1 is historically a slower lead-gen period. The strategy is to use this time for experimentation and creating targeted content that directly supports sales and partnerships, rather than focusing on high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [**Sanity Priority:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Pipeline:** Sanity is the top lead-generating partner. High-quality content strengthens this relationship and provides sales reps with valuable resources for cross-promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Content Angle:** Focus on emerging topics like Sanity AI features, which are less saturated and highly compelling to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
          - [**Example:** The "AI Agent" tool, which allows editors to query the CMS and auto-generate content based on the component library.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [**Content Inspiration:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**Product Roadmaps:** Monitor partner roadmaps for new features and beta programs to create timely content.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Internal Expertise:** Jesse will provide talking points and may organize short (1-min) developer videos to capture authentic insights.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**Existing Assets:** Reference the "AI capabilities" page and a thought-leadership blog by Jesse and Nikon for initial messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Partner Content Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
    1.  [**Sanity:** Top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
    2.  [**Storyblok:** Second priority, to revive a long-standing partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
    3.  [**Contentful:** Third priority.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Landing Page Optimization

  - [**Goal:** Transform CMS capability pages into focused conversion hubs.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Problem:** The current dynamic "Additional Resources" section is ineffective and risks keyword cannibalization with dedicated blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Solution:** Redesign the section with two components:](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
    1.  [**Static Cards:** A set of 3–5 high-value articles (e.g., "What is," "Benefits," "Migration").](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
    2.  [**Scrollable List:** A new component (similar to the blog listing page's featured posts) for other relevant articles, keeping the page length manageable.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [**Implementation:** Webstacks will manually update the pages for now. Katya will provide the list of articles to feature.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Tagging & Audit Alignment

  - [**Audit Mismatch:** A few URLs in the initial audit were not in the recent CMS export. Katya will reconcile these lists to ensure all content refresh plans are based on existing URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Tagging Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Use Claude to generate new tags, cross-referencing them with existing tags for consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [**Webstacks' Approach:** Consolidate "Industries" and "Technologies" into general "Tags" to simplify the blog filter.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
      - [**Rule:** Add industry-specific tags (e.g., SaaS, FinTech) only if there's a significant batch of related articles (\>5–6), to support dynamic filtering on resource components.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)

### Task Management

  - [**New System:** GrowthX is implementing a new task tracking database.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [**Communication:** Webstacks will be notified of task updates via Slack. This is the most effective channel to ensure visibility and action.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Reconcile the content audit with the CMS export.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Finalize and share the prioritized Sanity topic list by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
      - [Provide the list of articles to feature on CMS capability pages.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
      - [Investigate Slack notifications for task updates.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
      - [Deliver the first performance report in the first week of February.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [**Jesse:**](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Provide talking points and potentially developer videos for Sanity AI content.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Manually update CMS capability pages with the new article lists.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [Explore adding a scrollable featured post component to the pages.](https://fathom.video/share/WJMSpR9eSUs_jRynseyT_kHjZ_Wk7CRk?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
